Review this pull request based ONLY on the diff provided.

Rules:
- Review ONLY the code changes shown in the diff
- Analyze only added or modified lines in the diff
- Do NOT review the whole file or class
- Ignore removed lines and unchanged context
- Ignore formatting-only changes
- Ignore generated files, lockfiles, and snapshots
- Ignore .github/workflows/** files
- Ignore README.md
- Focus only on real issues introduced by this PR, such as:
  - missing null checks
  - edge cases
  - incorrect logic
  - unsafe handling
  - performance problems in new code
  - missing validation
- Keep output very short and practical
- Do not include reasoning
- Do not include tool logs
- Do not include completion status
- Do not include separators like ---output---
- Do not include any text before or after the final answer
- Do not mention files without issues
- Do not repeat the same finding

Return ONLY the final answer starting with this exact line:
===FINAL_REVIEW===

If issues exist, output only in this format:
- file_path: short issue → suggested fix

If no issues, output exactly:
No significant issues found.
